retry_reason: Failure occurs only for self-dependency (EINVAL) or type mismatch (EINVAL); retrying with the same arguments would produce the same result.
contract_summary: This is a get-wrapper that establishes a dependency relationship between two iommufd objects of the same type. It increments the refcount of obj_depended to keep it alive while it is depended upon. The caller must call a corresponding release (e.g., iommufd_object_unref) when the dependency is no longer needed. The function includes validation to prevent self-dependency and cross-type dependencies, which would cause deadlocks or lifetime mismatches. On failure (non-zero return), no reference is taken.
